scenarios.name: base_single_light
scenarios.label: standard_single_run
scenarios.description: Clean single compaction cycles with lower load and modest peak pressure.

scenarios.name: base_single_medium
scenarios.label: standard_single_run
scenarios.description: Clean single compaction cycles close to the case-study operating band.

scenarios.name: base_single_heavy_near_full
scenarios.label: standard_single_run
scenarios.description: Clean single cycles with elevated baseline and peaks suggesting high fullness.

scenarios.name: double_run_clear
scenarios.label: double_run
scenarios.description: Two back-to-back compaction cycles in one payload with a sharp drop and re-ramp.

scenarios.name: double_run_late_boundary
scenarios.label: double_run
scenarios.description: Double-runs where the first run is longer and the boundary appears later than expected.

scenarios.name: double_run_ambiguous_boundary
scenarios.label: double_run
scenarios.description: Double-runs with a shallower transition drop near the detector threshold.

scenarios.name: single_run_deep_dip_false_positive_risk
scenarios.label: standard_single_run_with_dip
scenarios.description: Single cycles with a transient dip but no sustained re-ramp boundary.

scenarios.name: startup_spike_extreme_sync
scenarios.label: startup_spike
scenarios.description: Payloads with oversized sync/startup artifacts that must not affect metrics.

scenarios.name: truncated_payload
scenarios.label: truncated
scenarios.description: Partial transmissions with too few samples to trust as full cycles.

scenarios.name: peak_saturation
scenarios.label: peak_saturation
scenarios.description: Runs clipping at an ADC-like ceiling, hiding true peak pressure.

scenarios.name: low_battery_weak_signal_noisy
scenarios.label: low_power_noisy
scenarios.description: Runs with weak signal, low battery, and high noise/dropout risk.

scenarios.name: baseline_drift
scenarios.label: baseline_drift
scenarios.description: Sequential-looking records where low/baseline values drift upward over time.

scenarios.name: dropout_missing_values
scenarios.label: dropout_missing_values
scenarios.description: Payloads that preserve blank CSV slots from intermittent sensor/transmission gaps.

scenarios.name: triple_run_buffered
scenarios.label: multi_run
scenarios.description: Three buffered cycles in one message for stress-testing split logic.
